testimonial1.text: Excellent service! Alasayl Transport is always reliable and on time. Very professional team.

testimonial2.text: We have been working together for years and are very satisfied. Fast communication and flexible solutions.

testimonial3.text: Reliable partner for our company. Always correct handling and friendly drivers.

fleet.title: Our Fleet
fleet.subtitle: More than 15 modern vehicles for all your transport needs

about.title: About Alasayl Transport
about.subtitle: Reliable transport company based in Echt, Limburg

company.title: About Us
company.description: Alasayl Transport is a professional transport company based in Echt, Limburg. With more than 15 vehicles and years of experience, we provide reliable freight transport services across the Netherlands.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: Delivering reliable and efficient transport services that exceed our customers' expectations.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To become a leading transport partner in the Netherlands and beyond, with expansion into international markets.

expansion.title: Expansion into New Markets
expansion.description: Alasayl Transport is expanding! We have started providing our services in the Middle East and Saudi Arabia, strengthening our international presence.

servicesPage.title: Our Transport Services
servicesPage.subtitle: We offer a wide range of logistics solutions for your business

packages.title: Package Delivery
packages.description: Reliable delivery of packages with focus on speed and safety. We ensure that your packages are handled with the utmost care and arrive on time.

freight.title: Commercial Freight
freight.description: Professional transport of commercial goods and pallets. Our drivers are experienced in safely transporting heavy and voluminous freights.

newspapers.title: Newspaper Delivery
newspapers.description: Timely distribution of newspapers and magazines, every single day. We understand the importance of early delivery and guarantee reliable night distribution.

urgent.title: Urgent Shipments
urgent.description: Immediate action for your most urgent deliveries. Our couriers are available 24/7 to bring your goods directly to the destination without any intermediate stops.

fleetPage.title: Our Modern Fleet
fleetPage.subtitle: High-quality vehicles for all your transport needs
fleetPage.overview: At Alasayl Transport, we have a diverse fleet of more than 15 modern vehicles. Our fleet is regularly maintained and meets the strictest environmental requirements (Euro 6), allowing us to provide sustainable and reliable services.

intro.title: Join Our Team!
intro.description: At Alasayl Transport we look for motivated professionals who want to contribute to our growth. We offer a dynamic work environment with good working conditions and growth opportunities.

driver.description: We are looking for reliable drivers for our growing fleet.
benefits: Fixed work days (6 days per week)
